name: Rittenhouse Estate Buyers | Buy & Sell Luxury Watches & Jewelry
description_short: Philadelphia-based buyer and reseller of pre-loved luxury watches, jewelry, handbags, and collectibles with 35+ years of history. Offers discounted luxury goods and buys high-end items directly from consumers.
description_long:
Rittenhouse Estate Buyers (REB) is a luxury goods buyer and reseller located in Philadelphia's Rittenhouse Square neighborhood. The company traces its roots to 1985 as National Watch and Diamond on Philadelphia's Jewelers' Row, operating for over 35 years before rebranding and relocating during the COVID-19 pandemic. The rebranding represented a strategic shift from primarily wholesale and auction house operations to direct-to-consumer retail sales of pre-owned luxury items.

The company specializes in buying and selling a diverse range of luxury goods including pre-owned watches from brands like Rolex, Cartier, and Omega; fine jewelry from Cartier, Tiffany & Co., and Van Cleef & Arpels; designer handbags from Louis Vuitton and Chanel; gold and silver bullion; sports cards and memorabilia; and numismatic coins. Their retail inventory features items priced from hundreds to over $15,000, with merchandise positioned as "pre-loved luxury" at discounts described as up to 70% off retail prices. The company operates a dual business model: they actively purchase valuables from the public while maintaining a curated retail inventory.

Rittenhouse Estate Buyers distinguishes itself through its long operational history and established reputation in the Philadelphia luxury goods market. The company emphasizes transparency, customer service, and consistent inventory turnover, noting they are "always buying" to keep their selection fresh. They offer incentives including an additional 10% when customers bring items in-person, highlight secure payment methods, and claim a 98% customer satisfaction rate with over 1,500 happy customers. The physical location in Rittenhouse Square positions them within a recognized luxury neighborhood.

A key consideration is that this is fundamentally a pawn and collateral-based business rather than a consumer finance lender. They do not provide credit, loans, or financial assistance products—they buy and sell tangible assets. The company's valuation practices, buyback prices, and authenticity guarantees are not detailed on their website, which may be important factors for consumers considering selling valuables to them. Their business model relies on significant markups between purchase and retail prices.
pros: 35+ years of established operational history and reputation in the Philadelphia luxury goods market
Consistent inventory through active buying—customers can find new items regularly as stated on website
Additional 10% incentive offered when customers bring items in-person for sale
Wide range of luxury brands including Rolex, Cartier, Tiffany & Co., and Van Cleef & Arpels
Prices advertised at up to 70% off retail for pre-owned luxury items
Claims 98% customer satisfaction rate with 1,500+ documented customers
Physical location in upscale Rittenhouse Square neighborhood with accessible storefront
cons: Website does not disclose specific buyback prices or valuation methodology for items being sold to them
No information provided about authentication processes or guarantees for pre-owned luxury items
Prices shown on website appear to be retail prices without transparent markup disclosure between what they pay and what they resell for
Limited detail on return policies, warranties, or protections for purchased items
No mention of credentials, certifications, or third-party authentication standards for watches and jewelry
best_for: Luxury watch and jewelry collectors looking to buy pre-owned items at discounted prices
Individuals with high-end watches, jewelry, handbags, or collectibles they want to sell quickly
Investors interested in buying and selling gold, silver bullion, or numismatic coins
Philadelphia-area residents seeking a local, established business for luxury goods transactions
diagnosis: Rittenhouse Estate Buyers is best for Philadelphia-area consumers and collectors who want to buy discounted pre-owned luxury goods or sell existing high-value items like watches and jewelry to an established local buyer. The main caveat is that this is a pawn/collateral business focused on asset purchase and resale—not a lender or credit provider—and consumers should independently verify valuations, authentication, and return policies before transacting, as these details are not transparent on their website.
services: Purchase of pre-owned luxury watches from major brands
Purchase of fine and designer jewelry items
Purchase of gold and silver bullion
Purchase of sports cards and memorabilia
Purchase of numismatic coins and collectibles
Retail sale of pre-owned luxury watches
Retail sale of fine and designer jewelry
Retail sale of gold and silver bullion
In-store customer incentives (10% bonus for bringing items in)
Email list enrollment for inventory updates and seasonal sales
